seo.title: HaBuk — The Complete Restaurant Ecosystem
seo.description: HaBuk connects your entire restaurant operation — customer ordering, staff management, delivery tracking, and real-time analytics. Four apps, one system.

hero.subtext: HaBuk powers your entire operation — from the table to the kitchen, from your staff to your customers' hands.

ecosystem.subtext: Every part of your restaurant operation covered, connected, and working together seamlessly.

client.name: HaBuk
client.description: The public app on App Store and Play Store. Customers browse restaurants, order food and drinks, track deliveries, and get real-time notifications.

staff.name: HaBuk Staff
staff.description: Internal tool for on-premises ordering, full menu management, order type configuration, opening hours, and fiscal device integration.

manager.name: HaBuk Manager
manager.description: The management dashboard. Track profits, monitor staff efficiency, analyse peak hours, and run your business with a built-in ERP system.

delivery.name: HaBuk Delivery
delivery.description: Drivers sign in, receive completed kitchen orders, and deliver directly to customers — everything tracked in real time.

clientApp.headline: The app your customers will love
clientApp.subtext: Available on App Store and Play Store. Rated highly by real users across every restaurant on the platform.
features: Browse multiple restaurants in one hub
Order for dine-in, delivery, or takeaway
Add notes and special preferences to any order
Real-time push notifications when orders are ready
Live delivery tracking — from kitchen to door

staffApp.headline: Full control in the palm of your hand
staffApp.subtext: Built to make your team faster, smarter, and more confident — without any training overhead.
features: Manual on-premises ordering at the table or counter
Add and manage food categories and products
Full product control — prices, descriptions, photos
Toggle delivery, dine-in, and takeaway on or off
Set opening hours and configure customer notifications
Connect thermal and fiscal printers seamlessly

managerApp.headline: Stay on top of everything
managerApp.subtext: Built for the people running the business, not just working in it.
features: Real-time revenue and profit tracking
Staff performance and efficiency insights
Peak hours analysis and demand forecasting
Identify low-performing products instantly
Built-in custom ERP system for full business control

deliveryApp.headline: Your drivers, always in sync
deliveryApp.subtext: The last piece of the puzzle. Seamless delivery from kitchen to customer door.
features: Drivers sign in and receive completed orders instantly
Full order details and delivery address at a glance
Real-time status updates sent back to customers
Seamless kitchen-to-door handoff with zero friction

cta.headline: Ready to upgrade your restaurant?
cta.subtext: Tell us about your restaurant and we'll get HaBuk set up for you.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Try emailing us directly.

systemFlow.headline: Built to work together.
systemFlow.subtext: One action in any app ripples through the entire system.
systemFlow.hoverHint: Hover each app to see its connections.

legend.desc: Customer places order → Staff receives it instantly. Staff marks ready → Customer gets notified.
Completed order dispatched to the nearest available driver automatically.
Every order, sale, shift, and delivery feeds the Manager dashboard in real time.

systemFlow.modularNote: Not ready for the full system? Each app works standalone — start with what you need and scale as you grow.

table.title: Opening HaBuk...

table.desktop: This link is designed for mobile. Scan the QR code with your phone.
